zh.lifeSummary: 當6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod於大約1382年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief28歲，母親Janet MacLean23歲。他和Margaret Douglas至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1442年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾帕巴易享年61歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod于大约1382年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief28岁，母亲Janet MacLean23岁。他和Margaret Douglas至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1442年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾帕巴易享年61岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Borb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered short form of Robert , a later development than the common medieval forms Hob, Dob, and Nob, all of which, unlike Bob, have given rise to English surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod was born about 1382, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief, was 28 and his mother, Janet MacLean, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret Douglas. He died in 1442, in Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod est né environ 1382, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Janet MacLean, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret Douglas. Il est décédé en 1442, à Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod um 1382 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief 28 und seine Mutter Janet MacLean 23. Er hatte mit Margaret Douglas mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeodが約1382年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chiefは28歳，母Janet MacLeanは23歳であった。彼はMargaret Douglasとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1442年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアプアッバイで61歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet MacLean(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret Douglas(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 파브베이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret Douglas. Ele faleceu em 1442, em Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod родился около 1382 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Cleireach the Clerk Macleod Vth of Dunvegan Vth Chief было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet MacLean, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret Douglas. Он умер в 1442 г. в местности паббеи, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.
